response.justification: While Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, he lacks demonstrable deep expertise in Java/Kotlin, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — the core requirements of the role. His Java exposure is minimal and historical, with no evidence of building or maintaining IDE subsystems, language servers, or build tool integrations.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer-focused projects
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial Java/Kotlin production experience in enterprise contexts
Absence of any mention of IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM optimization work
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with JVM-focused role
